title: Section 56
content: (1) Leave may be granted to the Commissioner by the Standing Committee. (2) Whenever such leave is granted to the Commissioner 1[2[the Central Government]] shall appoint another person to officiate as Commissioner in his place.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2, for "Central Government" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 2. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for "Government" (w.e.f. 22-5-2022).
